tagline: Turn every bill into a plan.

designSystem.style: Dark fintech UI with teal-green primary accents, warm amber warnings, and coral red danger indicators. Glassmorphism-inspired cards on a near-black background. High-contrast typography with strong visual hierarchy. Micro-interaction animations on button presses and tab transitions.

screens: Home — Balance overview, 30-day cash flow mini-bars, danger alert strip, quick actions, upcoming bills preview
Flow — 30-day cash flow simulation calendar with interactive day selector, reshaping suggestions with one-tap actions
Bills — Monthly bills list with micro-savings progress tracker, snooze toggles, status indicators
Check — Purchase safety checker with preset amounts, real-time cash flow impact analysis, plain-English guidance
Insights — Spending breakdown, plain-language financial patterns, monthly cash health score
